ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the endpoint URL for your S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 请输入你的 S3 兼容存储的端点 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the region for your S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 请输入你的 S3 兼容存储的区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 请输入你的 S3 访问密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 请输入你的 S3 秘密密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 输入你的 S3 存储桶名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the base URL for constructing full object URLs.
ast.target: 输入用于构建完整对象 URL 的基础 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test the connection to your S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 测试与 S3 兼容存储的连接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional proxy for image loading - speed may vary
ast.target: 可选的图片加载代理 - 速度可能有所不同

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select folders to monitor. All attachments in these folders will be uploaded.
ast.target: 选择要监控的文件夹。将上传这些文件夹中的所有附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, attachments in all subfolders of the selected folders will be monitored. If disabled, only attachments in the selected folders will be monitored.
ast.target: 启用后，将监控所选文件夹所有子文件夹中的附件。禁用后，仅监控所选文件夹中的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned off, you can manually upload attachments with one click through the command panel by "Cloud Storage: Upload attachments from the monitored folder" or "Cloud Storage: Upload attachments in current file".
ast.target: 如果关闭，你可以通过命令面板一键手动上传附件，使用“Cloud Storage: Upload attachments from the monitored folder”或“Cloud Storage: Upload attachments in current file”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable this option if you prefer fewer notifications
ast.target: 如果你希望减少通知，请禁用此选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select how to handle local files after successful cloud upload.
ast.target: 选择云端上传成功后如何处理本地文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the folder where uploaded attachments will be moved.
ast.target: 指定已上传附件将被移动到的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between blacklist and whitelist for file extensions
ast.target: 选择文件扩展名的黑名单或白名单

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter file extensions separated by commas (e.g., jpg,png,pdf)
ast.target: 输入以逗号分隔的文件扩展名（例如：jpg,png,pdf）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rename files when uploading to ensure uniqueness and avoid overwriting
ast.target: 上传时重命名文件以确保唯一并避免覆盖

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between plugin-provided storage or custom S3-compatible storage.
ast.target: 选择插件提供的存储或自定义的 S3 兼容存储。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manage your storage space and uploaded files
ast.target: 管理存储空间和已上传文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset your password if you have forgotten it.

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum File Size For Automatic Uploads (MB)
ast.target: 自动上传的最大文件大小 (MB)

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 上传后的本地文件处理

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 你的 S3 访问密钥

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Recovery did not find matching data. You can register as a new account.
ast.target: 恢复未找到匹配数据。你可以注册新账号。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: userAgentAppId must be a string or undefined.
ast.target: userAgentAppId 必须是字符串或 undefined。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The provided userAgentAppId exceeds the maximum length of 50 characters.
ast.target: 提供的 userAgentAppId 超过最大长度 50 个字符。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: An error was encountered in a non-retryable streaming request.
ast.target: 在不可重试的流式请求中遇到错误。

ast.source: S3Express does not support S3 Accelerate.

ast.source: Unrecognized hardware type: "Expected hardware type o or e but got {hardwareType}"
ast.target: 无法识别的硬件类型：“期望的硬件类型为 o 或 e，但收到 {hardwareType}”

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid ARN: The outpost Id must only contain a-z, A-Z, 0-9 and `-`.
ast.target: 无效 ARN：outpost Id 只能包含 a-z、A-Z、0-9 和 `-`。

ast.target: 此区域无法使用 S3 Accelerate

ast.target: 无效 ARN：缺少账户 ID

ast.target: 无效 ARN：bucket ARN 缺少区域

ast.source: Invalid ARN: Object Lambda ARNs only support `accesspoint` arn types, but found: `{arnType}`

ast.name: error
ast.source: Access Points do not support S3 Accelerate
ast.target: Access Points 不支持 S3 Accelerate

ast.source: S3 MRAP does not support dual-stack

ast.target: S3 MRAP 不支持 S3 加速

ast.target: 配置无效：多区域访问点 ARN 已被禁用。

ast.source: Client was configured for partition `{mrapPartition#name}` but bucket referred to partition `{bucketArn#partition}`
ast.target: 客户端被配置为分区 `{mrapPartition#name}`，但存储桶引用了分区 `{bucketArn#partition}`

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：应为 4 组件资源

ast.source: Invalid ARN: The outpost Id may only contain a-z, A-Z, 0-9 and `-`. Found: `{outpostId}`
ast.target: 无效的 ARN：outpost Id 只能包含 a-z、A-Z、0-9 和 `-`。发现：`{outpostId}`

ast.target: 无效的 ARN：未设置 Outpost Id

ast.target: 无效的 ARN：无法识别的格式：{Bucket}（类型：{arnType}）

ast.target: 无效的 ARN：`{Bucket}` 不是有效的 ARN

ast.name: error
ast.source: Path-style addressing cannot be used with ARN buckets
ast.target: 路径式寻址不能与 ARN 存储桶一起使用

ast.source: Path-style addressing cannot be used with S3 Accelerate
ast.target: S3 Accelerate 不支持路径样式地址

ast.name: error
ast.source: A region must be set when sending requests to S3.
ast.target: 向 S3 发送请求时必须设置区域。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Upload attachments from the monitored folder
ast.target: 从监控的文件夹上传附件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 上传当前文件中的附件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please select the region closest to you for optimal upload and download speeds.
ast.target: 请选择离您最近的区域，以获得最佳上传和下载速度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you have previously used OBCS and need to restore access to your cloud files, choose "Recover my data".
ast.target: 如果您之前使用过 OBCS 并需要恢复对云端文件的访问，请选择“恢复我的数据”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This tool scans your vault for existing OBCS cloud links and helps restore access to your files. The process is safe and will not modify your current vault files.
ast.target: 该工具会扫描您的保险库中现有的 OBCS 云链接，并帮助恢复对文件的访问。此过程安全，不会修改您当前的保险库文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the button below to start scanning your vault.
ast.target: 点击下面的按钮开始扫描您的保险库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you have any questions or need support, please contact us at: support@antmight.com
ast.target: 如有任何问题或需要支持，请通过以下方式联系我们：support@antmight.com
